# DYOR.sh

DYOR.sh is an AI-Native RWA research shell for tokenized real-world asset due diligence. It returns research briefs, unresolved issuer/collateral risk checks, source links, watch triggers, and comparison summaries. It does not provide financial advice, investment recommendations, price targets, or yield guarantees.

Status: MVP v0.1 is live on Cloudflare Pages with Pages Functions. The first live connector is Dexscreener as a market-data source for RWA-linked assets.

## Primary URLs

- Home: https://dyor.sh/
- Docs: https://dyor.sh/docs
- Capabilities manifest: https://dyor.sh/api/capabilities
- OpenAPI schema: https://dyor.sh/openapi.json
- AI plugin manifest: https://dyor.sh/.well-known/ai-plugin.json
- Sitemap: https://dyor.sh/sitemap.xml
- Markdown brief example: https://dyor.sh/api/brief?q=Gold%20RWA&format=md

## Commands

- `/scan Gold RWA`: resolve an RWA category, asset, contract, issuer, project, Dexscreener URL, or explorer URL into a structured report.
- `/redflags OpenAI Pre-IPO RWA`: focus on unresolved RWA risks and what would reduce them.
- `/watch Gold RWA`: scan and pin an RWA category or asset into the local research queue.
- `/compare Gold RWA vs U.S. Equities RWA`: compare two RWA categories or assets by risk, issuer identity confidence, liquidity, volume, and market coverage.

## API Endpoints

- `GET /api/scan?q=Gold%20RWA`: JSON RWA research report.
- `POST /api/scan` with `{ "q": "Gold RWA" }`: JSON RWA research report.
- `GET /api/redflags?q=OpenAI%20Pre-IPO%20RWA`: compact JSON red flag checklist.
- `GET /api/redflags?q=OpenAI%20Pre-IPO%20RWA&format=md`: Markdown red flag checklist.
- `GET /api/compare?a=Gold%20RWA&b=U.S.%20Equities%20RWA`: JSON RWA comparison.
- `GET /api/watch?q=Gold%20RWA,U.S.%20Equities%20RWA`: batch watch refresh.
- `POST /api/watch` with `{ "items": [{ "id": "gold-rwa", "label": "Gold RWA", "query": "Gold RWA" }] }`: batch watch refresh.
- `GET /api/brief?q=Gold%20RWA&format=md`: Markdown RWA research report.
- `GET /api/brief?a=Gold%20RWA&b=U.S.%20Equities%20RWA&format=md`: Markdown RWA comparison brief.
- `GET /api/capabilities`: machine-readable commands and endpoints.
- `GET /api/manifest`: alias for `/api/capabilities`.

## Data Notes

The current live connector is Dexscreener. Reports include market evidence, chain explorer links, issuer identity confidence, structured red flags, watch triggers, alternatives, and source links when available. Issuer docs, reserve/collateral proof, redemption terms, holder distribution, custody, contract verification, and deeper source checks are planned follow-up connectors.
